### Hi, my name is

# Anuj Patel.

## I build backend & AI-powered systems.

Hello! I'm Anuj, a **Software Engineer (Backend & Applied AI Systems)** currently pursuing my Master's in Computer Science at the **University of Texas at Arlington**, graduating in May 2027. I specialize in building end-to-end AI and backend systems, including LLM-powered automation, OCR pipelines, REST APIs, and scalable data-processing workflows.


With hands-on experience designing production-ready architectures, multi-agent systems, and ML-driven applications, I focus on reliability, performance, and real-world deployment.


[View My Work](https://anujpatel04.me/#projects)

Developed a production-style user retention and churn intelligence system using transaction-level behavioral data, optimized for business impact rather than raw model accuracy. Built a role-based AI expense management system using Flask and MongoDB, enabling secure bill uploads, automated extraction, and HR approval workflows.
